summary: Iteration 166 - Barrister View No Auto-Generate Feature Verification Complete. All features verified working: (1) Backend returns 404 when no barrister report exists and regenerate param is not provided. (2) Backend starts generation only when regenerate=true is passed. (3) Reports list includes barrister_view type alongside other 3 report types. (4) Frontend Generate Report dialog shows Barrister View with UNLOCKED badge and 'Click Generate to create' instruction. (5) Barrister Brief appears in reports list with CAPSTONE badge and teal color scheme.
critical_code_review_comments: BACKEND: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/barrister-view correctly returns 404 when no report exists and regenerate is not true (line 4227-4228 in server.py)
BACKEND: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports/barrister-view?regenerate=true correctly starts generation and returns status 'generating' (line 4230-4272 in server.py)
BACKEND: GET /api/cases/{case_id}/reports correctly includes barrister_view type reports in the list
FRONTEND: Generate Report dialog shows Barrister View option with UNLOCKED badge when all 3 standard reports are completed
FRONTEND: Barrister View option shows 'Click Generate to create' instruction text
FRONTEND: Reports tab shows all 4 report types as expandable cards (Quick Summary, Full Detailed, Extensive Log, Barrister Brief)
FRONTEND: Barrister Brief card shows CAPSTONE badge with teal/cyan color scheme
FRONTEND: BarristerView page handles 'not_generated' status and shows appropriate message instead of auto-generating
seed_data_creation: None - used existing case_f8bf63e9dcbe (Homann v R) with all 4 reports
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 166 verified the Barrister View no-auto-generate feature. Key changes: (1) Backend /barrister-view endpoint now returns 404 when no report exists and regenerate param is not provided - this prevents auto-generation when navigating to the page. (2) Generation only starts when regenerate=true is explicitly passed. (3) Frontend Generate Report dialog now includes Barrister View as a proper generatable option (not just a nav link) with UNLOCKED badge when all 3 standard reports are completed. (4) Once generated, Barrister Brief appears in the reports list alongside the other 3 reports with CAPSTONE badge and teal color scheme. All backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified working correctly.
